description: Schema definition for PriceSpecification in the Beckn Protocol v2.0.1
title: PriceSpecification

value.description: Total value for this price specification

components.description: Optional itemised breakup of this price (base charge, tax, delivery, discount, fee, surcharge). Each element is a PriceComponent, which may carry a JSON-LD componentAttributes bag describing the rationale, calculation, and terms of the line.
